final:
module RefModule
(
    input clk,
    input rst,
    input [7:0] d,
    output reg [7:0] q
);

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge rst or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (rst) begin
        q <= 8'b00000000;
    end else begin
        q <= d;
    end
end

endmodule
